title: Color Register Athlete Or Performer
sourceTitle: Color Register Midjourney Prompt Athlete Or Performer
prompt: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] in [PEAK ACTION POSE] rendered as a halftone-grain duotone figure on aged cream ground, overlaid by [NUMBER] bold vertical color band columns — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — each acting as a transparent Risograph ink layer through which the figure reads differently: silhouette in one, halftone detail in another, near-washed in the third. Slight misregistration between layers. Scratch marks, print grain, ink bleed at band edges. Constructivist sports poster meets Risograph print process. --v 8.1
originalPrompt: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] in [PEAK ACTION POSE] rendered as a halftone-grain duotone figure on aged cream ground, overlaid by [NUMBER] bold vertical color band columns — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — each acting as a transparent Risograph ink layer through which the figure reads differently: silhouette in one, halftone detail in another, near-washed in the third. Slight misregistration between layers. Scratch marks, print grain, ink bleed at band edges. Constructivist sports poster meets Risograph print process. --v 8.1

promptTranslations.zh: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] 在 [PEAK ACTION POSE] 中，渲染为陈年奶油色背景上的半色调颗粒双色调人物形象，覆盖以 [NUMBER] 粗体垂直色带柱——[COLOR1]、[COLOR2]、[COLOR3]——每层作为透明Risograph版墨水层，呈现不同视效：一个中为轮廓，一个中为半色调细节，另一个近似褪色。层间微小错位。刮痕、印刷颗粒、色带边缘溢墨。构成主义体育海报与Risograph打印工艺混合。--v 8.1
promptTranslations.fr: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] en [PEAK ACTION POSE] rendu comme une silhouette en grain de trame bicolore sur fond crème vieilli, surmonté par [NUMBER] colonnes verticales audacieuses de couleur — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — chacune agissant comme une couche d’encre Risograph transparente à travers laquelle la figure se lit différemment : silhouette dans l’une, détails tramés dans une autre, presque lavée dans la troisième. Légère désalignement entre les couches. Rayures, grain d’impression, débordement d’encre aux bords des bandes. Affiche sportive constructiviste rencontre le procédé d’impression Risograph. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ru: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] в [PEAK ACTION POSE] изображён как дюотон с гало-эффектом и зернистостью на старом кремовом фоне, сверху положены смелые вертикальные цветовые полосы [NUMBER] — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — каждая из которых служит прозрачным слоем ризографской краски, через который фигура читается по-разному: силуэт на одном, детализированная полутональность на другом, почти смытая в третьем. Небольшие смещения между слоями. Следы царапин, зернистость печати, кровоточащие края полос. Конструктивистский спортивный плакат, сочетающийся с ризографским процессом печати. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.pt: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] em [PEAK ACTION POSE] renderizado como figura duotone com grão em semitons sobre fundo creme envelhecido, sobreposto por [NUMBER] colunas verticais de cor em negrito — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — cada uma atuando como camada transparente de tinta Risograph através da qual a figura é lida de forma diferente: silhueta em uma, detalhe em semitons em outra, quase lavada na terceira. Pequeno desalinhamento entre camadas. Marcas de arranhões, grão de impressão, sangramento de tinta nas bordas das faixas. Cartaz construtivista de esporte encontra processo de impressão Risograph. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ja: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] が [PEAK ACTION POSE] にて、経年したクリーム色の背景にハーフトーン粒子の二色刷りで表現され、[NUMBER] の太い縦色バンド列が重なる。— [COLOR1]、[COLOR2]、[COLOR3] — それぞれが透明なリソグラフインク層として機能し、フィギュアは異なった印象に映る：ひとつはシルエット、別のはハーフトーンの詳細、三つ目はほとんど色が抜けている。レイヤー間にわずかなズレ。スクラッチマーク、印刷の粒子、バンド端のインクのにじみ。構成主義風スポーツポスターとリソグラフ印刷技法の融合。--v 8.1
promptTranslations.ko: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER]를 [PEAK ACTION POSE]에서 표현, 오래된 크림색 배경에 하프톤 그레인 이중 톤 인물, [NUMBER] 굵은 세로 색상 띠 열로 오버레이 — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — 각각 투명한 리소그래프 잉크 레이어로 작용하며 인물을 다르게 읽음: 한쪽에서는 실루엣, 다른 쪽에는 하프톤 디테일, 세 번째는 거의 세척된 느낌. 레이어 간 미세한 불일치, 긁힘 자국, 인쇄 알갱이, 띠 가장자리의 잉크 번짐. 구성주의 스포츠 포스터와 리소그래프 인쇄 기법의 만남. --v 8.1
